name: Cream of Corn Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the onion and celery leaves in butter until softened.
2. Add flour, stirring constantly to form a smooth paste.
3. Slowly add scalded milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
4. Gradually incorporate boiling water, cooking over low heat until thickened.
5. Stir in corn and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. If desired, substitute celery salt for the chopped celery leaves.
Serves: 6
